current_kubernetes_version.description: Specifies the current Kubernetes version running on the cluster

fqdn.description: The fully qualified domain name used to access the cluster

http_application_routing_zone_name.description: DNS zone name for HTTP application routing in the cluster

id.description: Unique identifier for the Kubernetes cluster resource

kube_admin_config.description: Admin configuration for interacting with the cluster

kube_admin_config_raw.description: Raw admin configuration data for API requests to the cluster

kube_config.description: User configuration for accessing and managing the cluster

kube_config_raw.description: Raw user configuration data for direct Kubernetes API interaction

node_resource_group_id.description: Identifier for the resource group containing cluster nodes

oidc_issuer_url.description: OIDC issuer URL for identity integration in the cluster

portal_fqdn.description: Portal domain name for accessing the cluster dashboard

private_fqdn.description: Private fully qualified domain name for internal cluster access
